compiled_state.title: RED: Write guard test asserting issue_tracker.create_cmd absent from config test fixtures
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: TDD RED phase for config test cleanup. Add test_no_issue_tracker_create_cmd_in_config_fixtures to test-v2-clean-guard.sh: grep tests/scripts/test-read-config.sh and tests/scripts/test-flat-config-e2e.sh for 'issue_tracker.create_cmd', assert output is empty. FAILS RED since those files currently contain that key. Also add test_no_issue_tracker_create_cmd_in_schema: grep validate-config schema file for create_cmd property, assert absent.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED guard test for config fixtures
